haiku:
Blossoms paint the air,
Laughter twirls through the soft breeze,
Together we bloom.
Happy #MayDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Coconut clouds rise,
Sweet almond whispers beckon,
Joy in every bite.
Happy #NationalMacaroonDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the air,
Cake and dreams in every bite,
Joyous hearts unite.
#HappyBirthdayMotherJones from @ClamBakeSanta
